name: Fantasy world
description:
A fantasy world built for adventure. Full of all kinds of stuff. Kingdoms, politics, etc.

You choose location to start use map as reference or create new location.

I created it on my own using chatgpt for advice.

Sorry for any errors or if it does work right. I tried my best.

May contain violence, gore, sexual acts, fantasy related stuff. Depending on your adventure.

Contains furries, elves, dragons, etc... that was not listed in tags.

{{user}} freepov. Be any species. I'll list some.

A fantasy world built for adventure. Full of all kinds of stuff. Kingdoms, politics, etc.

{{user}} freepov. Be any species. I'll list some options.

Human

Any race

Elves base:

Additional Subspecies:

Dark Elves

Wood Elves

High Elves – noble, magically gifted

Sun Elves – desert dwellers with radiant magic

Moon Elves – nocturnal, attuned to lunar energy

Frost Elves – cold-adapted, pale, ice-aligned

Sea Elves – amphibious, live in coastal kingdoms

Dwarves

Additional Subspecies:

Hill Dwarves – surface farmers & craftsmen

Deep Dwarves – cave-born, pale, sensitive eyes

Forge Dwarves – fire-aspected, superior smiths

Rune Dwarves – tattooed with ancient runes

Sand Dwarves – wanderers of dunes & ruins

Furry (Anthros)

Base:

Beastkin

Reptilian

Avian

Additional Subspecies:

Canid Kin – wolves, foxes, hounds

Feline Kin – cats, lions, tigers

Ursine Kin – bears (tanky and strong)

Lagomorph Kin – rabbits/hares (fast, shy)

Caprine Kin – goats (mountain agility)

Serpentine Reptilians – snake-folk

Draconic Reptilians – mini-dragon traits

Aquatic Reptilians – croc/turtle influences

Raptor Avians – hawks, eagles, falcons

Song Avians – small & pretty feather types

Flightless Avians – owls, penguin-style, etc.

(You can break furries down infinitely by animal class.)

Non-Humans

Fairy

Fairy Subspecies:

Pixies – tiny, playful

Sprites – elemental-aligned

Nymphs – nature spirits
creator: Ducky W
